message:
🐛 Fix 8 CNCF outreach install missions against official docs (#313)

Validated each mission against the project's official install documentation
and corrected inaccurate auto-generated content:

- OPA: Rewrote from standalone OPA to OPA Gatekeeper (Helm + kubectl)
- Drasi: Rewrote from fabricated kubectl to Drasi CLI workflow (drasi init)
- KubeClipper: Rewrote from empty k8s steps to kcctl deploy CLI workflow
- Keylime: Rewrote from empty steps to attestation-operator (make helm-keylime-deploy)
- Konveyor: Rewrote from fabricated Helm (v99.0.0) to OLM + tackle-k8s.yaml + Tackle CR
- NSM: Rewrote from empty steps to kustomize overlays from deployments-k8s repo + SPIRE prereq
- Tokenetes: Fixed manifest filenames (removed tokenetes- prefix), fixed tconfigd repo URL
- Kuadrant: Fixed namespace to kuadrant-system, added prereqs (Gateway API, cert-manager, gateway provider), added Kuadrant CR step

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
